name: Claude & Cole | 7 mins in heaven
description:
Seven minutes in hМ¶eМ¶aМ¶vМ¶eМ¶nМ¶ hell with Claude and Cole.

Another weekend, another one of Vincent's parties. This time around the boys thought it'd be fun to play seven minutes in heaven.

(Un)lucky you got dragged into a storage room with Claude and Cole. Enjoy listening to their bickering and Cole shamelessly making moves on you.

AUTHOR'S NOTE:

oof, making this one took me wayyyy too long I'm so sorry guys аІҘвҒ вҖҝвҒ аІҘ

I've been thinking for a very long time which User felt right and decided at the end to not add any info about User at all. Saved tokens and lets y'all decide if you wanna be Cole's step-sibling or Claude's user & Andrew's younger sibling. I recommend adding info about User into the memory section if you decide to play whoever you were in their original bots!

also, shout-out to Xei Xei and Sparrowshark for helping me figure out how to make a functional multiple bot! I'd be lost without them (вҒ пјҫвҒ вҲҮвҒ пјҫвҒ )вҒ пҫү
